---
id: enrich-metadata-task
title: "Enrich metadata task"
description: "Triggers a background task to enrich artist and album metadata using AI and external sources. Returns an HTML fragment."

  method={"post"}
  path={"/preferences/tasks/enrich-metadata"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Triggers a background task to enrich artist and album metadata using AI and external sources. Returns an HTML fragment.
